Duas → Morning and Evening → "When waking up" The dua begins with "إِنَّ فِي خَلْقِ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ... in its later part (3:199 Surah Āl-'Imrān) has a missing shakl under the ل), its written as خَاشِعِينَ للَّهِ❌ which is wrong, its correct form is: خَاشِعِينَ لِلَّهِ ✅ Important note: I'v alrdy rprtd this issue thru eml on 30/01/26, i ws tld that it'll be resolved soon but its still nt & thts why i m rating it 1*
